about.title: About Morgan
about.summary: Staff-level backend and data engineer building reliable systems for wealth tech.
about.currentFocusText: I work on backend, data, and platform systems where correctness, operability, and clear ownership matter. Outside that work, I am exploring AI-native engineering workflows and the routines that keep ambitious projects sustainable.
